domain: Function Calling & Tool Use Training for SLMs

specialized_models.name: xLAM (Salesforce)
specialized_models.description: Family of Large Action Models for function calling. xLAM-1b-fc-r achieves 78.94% accuracy on BFCL, outperforming GPT-3.5-Turbo with just 1B params.
specialized_models.approach: APIGen pipeline with 3-stage verification (format, execution, semantic)

specialized_models.name: Gorilla / OpenFunctions (UC Berkeley)
specialized_models.description: LLM fine-tuned for API calling using Retriever Aware Training (RAT). Maintains the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard (BFCL).

specialized_models.name: NexusRaven (Nexusflow)
specialized_models.description: Function calling model based on CodeLLAMA-13B. V2 surpasses GPT-4 on single, nested, and parallel calls. No GPT-4 distillation used.
specialized_models.approach: Multi-step refinement pipeline mining function calls from open-source corpora (The Stack)

specialized_models.name: ToolACE-8B (Team ACE)
specialized_models.description: Fine-tuned LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct for tool usage. SOTA on BFCL. ICLR 2025 accepted.
specialized_models.approach: Self-evolution synthesis with 26,507 APIs + dual-layer verification

specialized_models.name: Hammer (MadeAgents)
specialized_models.description: On-device function calling model using function masking to reduce overfitting. ICLR 2025 Spotlight.
specialized_models.approach: Function masking (replacing names with random strings) + augmented irrelevance detection dataset

specialized_models.name: Octopus V2 (Nexa AI)
specialized_models.description: 2B on-device model using functional tokens for Android APIs. Surpasses GPT-4 accuracy with 95% less context length.
specialized_models.approach: Functional token strategy — tokenizes function names as special tokens

specialized_models.name: Agent-FLAN-7B (InternLM)
specialized_models.description: Mixed training on AgentInstruct, ToolBench, and ShareGPT. Llama2-7B outperforms prior works by 3.5%.

specialized_models.name: ToolLLaMA (OpenBMB)
specialized_models.description: LLaMA fine-tuned on ToolBench with DFSDT decision tree for planning. 16,464 real-world APIs.
specialized_models.approach: SFT on ChatGPT-generated instruction-solution pairs + DFSDT

specialized_models.name: Fara-7B (Microsoft)
specialized_models.description: Efficient agentic model for computer use, specialized for on-device agentic tasks.

specialized_models.name: Glaive Function Calling Model
specialized_models.description: 2.7B model trained on synthetic data with GPT-3.5/4-like function calling abilities. Multi-turn with intelligent function selection.
specialized_models.approach: Synthetic data generation via Glaive platform

training_datasets.name: Salesforce xlam-function-calling-60k
training_datasets.description: 60k verified examples across 21 domains, 3,673 APIs. APIGen pipeline with 3-stage verification.

training_datasets.name: ToolBench (OpenBMB)
training_datasets.description: 126k+ instruction-solution pairs with 16,464 real-world RESTful APIs across 49 categories from RapidAPI.

training_datasets.name: ToolACE Dataset
training_datasets.description: 26,507 APIs with multi-agent dialog generation and dual-layer verification. ICLR 2025.

training_datasets.name: Glaive Function Calling v2
training_datasets.description: 113k synthetic function calling examples. Multi-turn conversations with function call/non-function-call scenarios.

training_datasets.name: ToolMind
training_datasets.description: 360k reasoning-enhanced tool-use samples. Multi-agent simulation with trajectory and turn-level quality checks.

training_datasets.name: APIGen Pipeline
training_datasets.description: Automated pipeline for generating verifiable function-calling datasets. Format/execution/semantic verification.

fine_tuning_frameworks.name: LlamaFactory
fine_tuning_frameworks.description: Unified fine-tuning of 100+ LLMs/VLMs. Explicit function calling support via FunctionFormatter and ToolFormatter. Supports glaive_toolcall_en dataset.

fine_tuning_frameworks.name: Unsloth
fine_tuning_frameworks.description: 2x faster fine-tuning with 80% less memory. Web UI (Studio) for training. Supports Qwen, DeepSeek, Gemma.
fine_tuning_frameworks.models: Llama, Mistral, Phi, Qwen, Gemma, DeepSeek

fine_tuning_frameworks.name: Axolotl
fine_tuning_frameworks.description: General-purpose fine-tuning tool. No explicit function calling formatters but can be configured for it.

fine_tuning_frameworks.name: Hugging Face TRL
fine_tuning_frameworks.description: Transformer Reinforcement Learning library. Used for SFT, RLHF, DPO training.

cloud_fine_tuning_services.name: OpenAI Fine-tuning API
cloud_fine_tuning_services.description: SFT and RFT for function calling. Native tool_calls format. Min 10 examples, improvements from 50-100.

cloud_fine_tuning_services.name: Fireworks AI Fine-tuning
cloud_fine_tuning_services.description: SFT V2 with multi-turn function calling. RFT for advanced agentic tasks. 2x faster than V1. Multi-LoRA support.

cloud_fine_tuning_services.name: Azure OpenAI Fine-tuning
cloud_fine_tuning_services.description: Fine-tuning function calls in Azure OpenAI. Enterprise-grade with compliance features.

cloud_fine_tuning_services.name: Microsoft Azure ML (Phi-3 Fine-tuning)
cloud_fine_tuning_services.description: Fine-tune Phi-3/Phi-4 SLMs for function calling using Azure ML. Comprehensive guide available.

benchmarks_and_evaluation.name: Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard (BFCL) V4
benchmarks_and_evaluation.description: 2k+ question-function-answer pairs. AST evaluation. Covers simple, multiple, parallel, multi-turn, web search, memory categories.

benchmarks_and_evaluation.name: ToolBench / StableToolBench
benchmarks_and_evaluation.description: 16,464 APIs evaluation. StableToolBench adds virtual API server + stable evaluation with GPT-4 auto-evaluator.

benchmarks_and_evaluation.name: AgentBench
benchmarks_and_evaluation.description: 8 distinct environments to assess LLM-as-Agent reasoning and decision-making. ICLR 2024.

benchmarks_and_evaluation.name: tau-bench
benchmarks_and_evaluation.description: Multi-turn tool use benchmark. ToolMind reported 14.22% gains on tau-bench.

research_papers_key.title: Small Language Models for Efficient Agentic Tool Calling
research_papers_key.finding: 350M param SLM achieved 2.98x improvement over ChatGPT-CoT. 77.55% pass on ToolBench.

research_papers_key.title: Small Models, Big Tasks: Empirical Study on SLMs for Function Calling
research_papers_key.finding: Few-shot and fine-tuning dramatically improve SLM function calling.

research_papers_key.title: Optimizing Small Language Models for In-Vehicle Function-Calling
research_papers_key.finding: Domain-specific SLM fine-tuning for automotive function calling.

market_summary.key_trend: SLMs (1-7B) achieving parity with GPT-4 on function calling through targeted fine-tuning. Key enablers: high-quality synthetic datasets (APIGen, ToolACE), efficient training (LoRA/QLoRA), and on-device deployment (Octopus, Hammer).
